content: Resend batch API (resend.batch.send()) sends up to 100 emails per call. Each email can have different recipients, subject, and content. Attachments and scheduled_at NOT supported in batch. For scheduling, use Resend Schedule Email API (single emails only, not batch). SDK: resend@latest. Resend Topics feature allows per-category subscription management — assign a topic to emails, users can unsubscribe per topic while remaining on others; global Subscribed=false overrides all topics.
